payload.title: September 2023 Crime Report
payload.description: Monthly crime statistics report for the NYCT Subway system submitted by NYPD's Transit Bureau, covering major felonies including homicide, robbery, assault, and rape, as well as hate crimes.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.
entity.parent_organization is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Parent organizations are relation context. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

tool_args.label: September Total Major Felonies percent change
Jan-Sep Total Major Felonies percent change
Data are preliminary and subject to revision

payload.gap_text: FIGURES ARE PRELIMINARY AND SUBJECT TO FURTHER ANALYSIS AND REVISION
payload.description: All crime statistics in this report are marked as preliminary and may be revised.

tool_args.label: Report submitted by NYPD Transit Bureau for MTA

payload.description: The report is submitted by NYPD's Transit Bureau on a monthly basis
The purpose of this report is to provide Committee Members with statistical information

tool_args.label: NYPD Transit Bureau is part of NYPD

payload.description: NYPD's Transit Bureau is a bureau within the NYPD
